title: Om Book Shop is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Om Book Shop is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Om Book Shop is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
